THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ON VERDICT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, VENTURA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADVOCATE MINES LIMITED FOR TOTAL ECONOMIC AND NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $446,715.00 PLUS RECOVERABLE COSTS AND MINUS ANY SETTLEMENT CREDITS. PLAINTIFF AGREES NOT TO EXECUTE ON SAID JUDGMENT BEFORE JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC IS ENTERED AFTER HEARING TO DETERMINE RECOVERABLE COSTS AND SETTLEMENT CREDITS, OR UNTIL SUCH TIME THAT RECOVERABLE COSTS AND SETTLEMENT CREDITS HAVE BEEN AGREED TO BY THE PARTIES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
